overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The footage showcases neon-lit urban environments including covered walkways, commercial districts, and highway underpasses with distinct teal and magenta lighting. This is high-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces and atmospheric haze.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked elevated pedestrian walkway with distinctive teal walls and a graffiti-covered ceiling. The camera moves forward through this semi-covered corridor, passing NPCs carrying futuristic glowing umbrellas in pink and blue. The environment transitions toward a commercial area with bright digital billboards visible in the distance.

events.description: entering narrower corridor with large digital billboards on walls
descending metal staircase with industrial railings
emerging from enclosed corridor into area with more ambient street lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow commercial corridors and descending multiple staircases toward street level

notable_agents.action: standing with a glowing orange umbrella, facing the camera

entered.detail: large wall covered with multiple digital screens showing animated advertisements
industrial metal stairs with teal painted sides descending to lower level
rusted metal safety railings along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into narrower commercial corridors lined with large digital billboards and advertisements. The camera descends multiple metal staircases with industrial railings, moving through increasingly enclosed spaces. An NPC with a glowing orange umbrella stands prominently in the corridor. The environment shifts from the open covered walkway to a more industrial, stair-heavy section.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with vehicle traffic and neon storefronts

events.description: exiting enclosed walkways and emerging onto open street level with vehicle traffic
waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing the street
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: navigating from the enclosed walkways down to street level, crossing through traffic and turning along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the wet street with headlights on
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: open urban intersection with wet asphalt and yellow crosswalk markings
building facades with bright pink and orange neon signage including a prominent red horizontal neon strip
illuminated traffic signals showing green walk indicators

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the enclosed walkways onto a busy urban street at night. The scene opens to reveal wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from storefronts, moderate vehicle traffic with futuristic cars, and pedestrians walking along the sidewalks. The environment transitions from sheltered corridors to the exposed rainy street with active traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with heavy neon signage and vehicle traffic

events.description: large black SUV passes by on the left side of the frame
entering area with denser neon signage and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to moving traffic, passing various pedestrians and storefronts

pedestrian standing near the curb looking at the street

entered.detail: large concrete structure marking the entrance to a highway underpass with heavy support pillars
floating digital billboards and holographic product displays above the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy downtown street lined with bright neon signs and holographic advertisements. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from storefronts and vehicles. The camera passes pedestrians and futuristic cars, approaching a large highway underpass structure. The atmosphere is dense with urban activity and cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete infrastructure and fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering the covered highway underpass with heavy concrete pillars
transition from neon lighting to harsh fluorescent overhead lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the long concrete corridor beneath the highway, with vehicles visible on the road above and to the side

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with vehicles driving on the upper level
bright rectangular fluorescent lights mounted on the concrete walls
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a massive highway underpass characterized by heavy concrete infrastructure and bright fluorescent lighting. The environment shifts from the colorful neon of the commercial district to the utilitarian gray of the underpass. Large support pillars line the walkway, and the sound of traffic echoes from the highway overhead. The rain continues to fall at the entrance but the walkway is sheltered beneath the concrete structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor down into the bustling heart of a rain-soaked cyberpunk street. It begins on an elevated walkway with teal walls and a graffiti-covered ceiling, gliding past pedestrians carrying glowing pink and blue umbrellas toward distant digital billboards. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows into commercial corridors where it descends a series of industrial metal staircases, passing a figure with a glowing orange umbrella. The scene then opens from these enclosed, stair-heavy sections onto a wide urban thoroughfare. Finally, the camera emerges into the open rain, revealing wet asphalt that reflects the vibrant neon lights of storefronts and the movement of futuristic vehicle traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district into the stark, utilitarian depths of a massive highway underpass. It begins by gliding along a busy downtown street where holographic advertisements and bright storefronts cast vivid reflections across the rain-slicked pavement. As the camera passes through the crowd of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles, the dense urban activity gradually gives way to the looming presence of a concrete infrastructure. The scene then shifts from the colorful glow of the city to a gray, industrial environment as the camera moves beneath the highway, passing large support pillars under bright fluorescent lighting. Finally, the open rain of the street fades into a sheltered walkway where the echoes of overhead traffic dominate the atmosphere.
